name: Soup: Cream of Leek Soup with Mussels (Bon Ap
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring the water to a simmer.
2. Add the dry white wine and stir gently.
3. Place the thyme (either fresh sprigs or dried) into the pot.
4. Add the cleaned and debearded mussels to the pot.
5. Reduce heat to low and let the mixture simmer for about 10 minutes, allowing the mussels to open.
6. Use tongs to remove any mussels that do not open, as they may be shells closed.
7. Serve hot.
